subcodes.first_line: The Wondrous Book hath been sent down in truth from the presence of God, the Most High, the Most Great. Verily, it is a sign of truth amidst creation and a proof of the All-Merciful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب بدیع نزل بالحق من لدی الله العلی العظیم انه لایه الحق بین الخلق و برهان الرحمن
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @wisdom [hikmat], @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
